title: Prepare Annual Compliance Report
description: Compile and review all department compliance reports for the annual submission to the compliance committee.

title: Update Firewall Rules
description: Apply the latest firewall rule changes approved in change request CR-445 and verify connectivity.

title: Audit Access Logs for Anomalies
description: Review system access logs from the past week for unusual patterns and report findings to the security team.

title: Compliance Audit: Secret Handling
description: Review config-summary.md against the secret-handling policy (KB-500). Confirm no plaintext secrets are present and update the task status accordingly.

title: Review Encryption Policy Compliance
description: Verify that all data storage services are configured to use encryption at rest as mandated by policy KB-400.
